mapper.sql: id, user_id, name, type, bank, kind, balance, icon, sort_order, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM account WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO account (user_id, name, type, bank, kind, balance, icon, sort_order, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{name}, #{type}, #{bank}, #{kind}, #{balance}, #{icon}, #{sortOrder}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM account WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE account SET balance = balance + #{delta} WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
UPDATE account SET balance = #{balance}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM record WHERE account_id = #{accountId}
